title: Brachyscypha undulata

This fungus has been found to have potential health benefits, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which may aid in the treatment of various infections and inflammatory conditions. The bioactive constituents of Brachyscypha undulata include sesquiterpenoids and triterpenoids, which are responsible for its medicinal properties. Traditionally, this fungus has been used to make herbal preparations, such as decoctions and infusions, which are believed to have therapeutic effects, although further research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
